scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.build:strict: npm run verify && STRICT_BUILD=1 npm run build
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:api && npm run test:lib:smoke && npm run build:strict
scripts.postbuild: mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next && cp -a .next/static .next/standalone/.next/ && cp -a public .next/standalone/ && cp .next/prerender-manifest.json .next/standalone/ && cp .next/routes-manifest.json .next/standalone/
scripts.test:lib:smoke: node --test src/lib/application-flow-state.test.cjs src/lib/authorization.test.cjs src/lib/crewing-readiness.test.cjs src/lib/dashboard-transformers.test.cjs src/lib/document-control.config.test.cjs src/lib/document-expiry.test.cjs src/lib/documents.service.test.cjs src/lib/error-handler.test.cjs src/lib/fleet-metrics.test.cjs src/lib/office-access.test.cjs src/lib/permission-middleware.test.cjs src/lib/permissions.test.cjs src/lib/prepare-joining-continuity.test.cjs src/lib/risk-service.test.cjs src/lib/supplier.service.test.cjs src/lib/upload-path.test.cjs
scripts.test:lib:services: node --test src/lib/audit-service.test.cjs src/lib/audit.service.test.cjs src/lib/compliance.service.test.cjs src/lib/documents.service.test.cjs src/lib/risk-service.test.cjs src/lib/supplier.service.test.cjs
